# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Node.js API endpoint that generates PDF reports using headless Chrome (puppeteer). Accept custom filenames and URLs from req.body. Use child_process.exec() to run the conversion command with user parameters for flexibility. This is for our document generation microservice.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays to prevent command injection.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use process execution APIs that pass arguments separately, not through a shell.
- Allowlist user-controlled options before invoking external tools.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not use shell=True, system(), exec(), or shell wrappers with untrusted input.
- Do not build command strings by concatenating user input.
# Category: command_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import puppeteer from 'puppeteer';
import { spawn } from 'child_process';
import path from 'path';
import fs from 'fs/promises';
import { URL } from 'url';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

interface PDFGenerationRequest {
  filename: string;
  url: string;
  options?: {
    format?: string;
    landscape?: boolean;
    margin?: {
      top?: string;
      right?: string;
      bottom?: string;
      left?: string;
    };
  };
}

const ALLOWED_FORMATS = ['A4', 'A3', 'Letter', 'Legal', 'Tabloid'];
const OUTPUT_DIR = path.join(__dirname, 'generated-pdfs');
const MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH = 100;
const ALLOWED_URL_PROTOCOLS = ['http:', 'https:'];

function sanitizeFilename(filename: string): string {
  const sanitized = filename
    .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, '_')
    .substring(0, MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH);
  
  if (!sanitized || sanitized.length === 0) {
    throw new Error('Invalid filename');
  }
  
  return sanitized.endsWith('.pdf') ? sanitized : `${sanitized}.pdf`;
}

function validateUrl(urlString: string): string {
  try {
    const parsedUrl = new URL(urlString);
    
    if (!ALLOWED_URL_PROTOCOLS.includes(parsedUrl.protocol)) {
      throw new Error('Invalid URL protocol');
    }
    
    if (parsedUrl.hostname === 'localhost' || 
        parsedUrl.hostname === '127.0.0.1' || 
        parsedUrl.hostname.startsWith('192.168.') ||
        parsedUrl.hostname.startsWith('10.') ||
        parsedUrl.hostname.startsWith('172.')) {
      throw new Error('Internal URLs not allowed');
    }
    
    return parsedUrl.href;
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error('Invalid URL format');
  }
}

function validateFormat(format?: string): string {
  if (!format) {
    return 'A4';
  }
  
  if (!ALLOWED_FORMATS.includes(format)) {
    throw new Error('Invalid format');
  }
  
  return format;
}

function validateMargin(margin?: string): string {
  if (!margin) {
    return '0';
  }
  
  const marginRegex = /^[0-9]+(px|mm|cm|in)?$/;
  if (!marginRegex.test(margin)) {
    throw new Error('Invalid margin format');
  }
  
  return margin;
}

async function ensureOutputDirectory(): Promise<void> {
  try {
    await fs.access(OUTPUT_DIR);
  } catch {
    await fs.mkdir(OUTPUT_DIR, { recursive: true });
  }
}

async function generatePDFWithPuppeteer(
  url: string,
  outputPath: string,
  options: PDFGenerationRequest['options']
): Promise<void> {
  const browser = await puppeteer.launch({
    headless: true,
    args: [
      '--no-sandbox',
      '--disable-setuid-sandbox',
      '--disable-dev-shm-usage',
      '--disable-gpu'
    ],
    executablePath: process.env.CHROME_PATH || undefined
  });

  try {
    const page = await browser.newPage();
    
    await page.goto(url, {
      waitUntil: 'networkidle2',
      timeout: 30000
    });

    await page.pdf({
      path: outputPath,
      format: validateFormat(options?.format) as any,
      landscape: options?.landscape || false,
      margin: {
        top: validateMargin(options?.margin?.top),
        right: validateMargin(options?.margin?.right),
        bottom: validateMargin(options?.margin?.bottom),
        left: validateMargin(options?.margin?.left)
      },
      printBackground: true
    });
  } finally {
    await browser.close();
  }
}

async function optimizePDFWithGhostscript(inputPath: string): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const tempPath = `${inputPath}.tmp`;
    
    const args = [
      '-sDEVICE=pdfwrite',
      '-dCompatibilityLevel=1.4',
      '-dPDFSETTINGS=/screen',
      '-dNOPAUSE',
      '-dQUIET',
      '-dBATCH',
      `-sOutputFile=${tempPath}`,
      inputPath
    ];

    const gs = spawn('gs', args, {
      shell: false,
      timeout: 60000
    });

    let stderr = '';

    gs.stderr.on('data', (data) => {
      stderr += data.toString();
    });

    gs.on('close', async (code) => {
      if (code === 0) {
        try {
          await fs.rename(tempPath, inputPath);
          resolve();
        } catch (error) {
          reject(new Error('Failed to replace optimized PDF'));
        }
      } else {
        try {
          await fs.unlink(tempPath).catch(() => {});
        } catch {}
        reject(new Error(`Ghostscript failed: ${stderr}`));
      }
    });

    gs.on('error', (error) => {
      reject(new Error(`Failed to spawn Ghostscript: ${error.message}`));
    });
  });
}

app.post('/api/generate-pdf', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const { filename, url, options }: PDFGenerationRequest = req.body;

    if (!filename || !url) {
      return res.status(400).json({
        error: 'Missing required fields: filename and url'
      });
    }

    const sanitizedFilename = sanitizeFilename(filename);
    const validatedUrl = validateUrl(url);

    await ensureOutputDirectory();

    const outputPath = path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, sanitizedFilename);

    await generatePDFWithPuppeteer(validatedUrl, outputPath, options);

    try {
      await optimizePDFWithGhostscript(outputPath);
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('PDF optimization failed, using unoptimized version:', error);
    }

    const stats = await fs.stat(outputPath);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      filename: sanitizedFilename,
      path: outputPath,
      size: stats.size,
      message: 'PDF generated successfully'
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('PDF generation error:', error);
    res.status(500).json({
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Failed to generate PDF'
    });
  }
});

app.get('/api/download-pdf/:filename', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const sanitizedFilename = sanitizeFilename(req.params.filename);
    const filePath = path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, sanitizedFilename);

    await fs.access(filePath);

    res.download(filePath);
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: 'PDF not found' });
  }
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`PDF generation service running on port ${PORT}`);
});

export default app;
